mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_CARDS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USER_CARDS ( user_id, version_id, credit_app_id, check_app_id, card_password_hash, card_number, issue_date, expire_date, card_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{versionId}, #{creditAppId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{checkAppId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardPasswordHash}, #{cardNumber}, #{issueDate}, #{expireDate}, #{cardStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_CARDS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY issued_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_CARDS SET card_status = #{cardStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_card_id = #{userCardId}
mapper.select:
SELECT app_id, card_type, card_id, card_name, application_status, rejection_reason, applied_at, created_at FROM ( SELECT cca.credit_app_id AS app_id, 'CREDIT' AS card_type, cca.card_id AS card_id, c.card_name AS card_name, cca.application_status AS application_status, cca.rejection_reason AS rejection_reason, cca.applied_at AS applied_at, cca.created_at AS created_at FROM CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS cca JOIN CARDS c ON cca.card_id = c.card_id WHERE cca.user_id = #{userId} AND cca.application_status != 'DRAFT'
UNION ALL
SELECT cha.check_app_id AS app_id, 'CHECK' AS card_type, cha.card_id AS card_id, c.card_name AS card_name, cha.application_status AS application_status, cha.rejection_reason AS rejection_reason, cha.applied_at AS applied_at, cha.created_at AS created_at FROM CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS cha JOIN CARDS c ON cha.card_id = c.card_id WHERE cha.user_id = #{userId} AND cha.application_status != 'DRAFT' ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
